modelName: OC2 Data Breach - LLM Uplift with Uncertainty
modelDescription: An individual or small group threat actor breaches a data-rich organization through stolen credentials or exploits, exfiltrates sensitive information from weakly protected systems, and extorts the victim with threats of data release without using ransomware.

nodes.name: Successful Attack Rate
nodes.expression: rec * res * ini * pri * lat * col * exf * imp
